segment.source: Renders an off-center hero placing badge, headline, subheadline, two CTA buttons, and a short reassurance line (e.g. 'No credit card required') in an unbalanced grid beside a large image. Use it for: landing page openers with a product or lifestyle photo plus trial or signup actions, especially when trust microcopy accompanies the buttons. Prefer 'Hero Section' (split variant) for a balanced two-column layout; 'Minimal Hero' when there is no image.
